description: Multi-turn: view retention config -> update -> trigger manual cleanup (covers `neomind settings retention` + `set-retention` + `cleanup`; previously 0 coverage).

turns.user: What is the current telemetry retention policy?
Enable retention cleanup, run every 1 hour, default retention 168 hours.
Trigger a manual cleanup right now.

per_turn: Turn 1: Agent runs `neomind settings retention` (or GET /api/settings/retention)
Turn 2: Agent runs `neomind settings set-retention --enabled --interval-hours 1 --default-retention 168` (or PUT equivalent)
expectations.overall: Turn 2/3 must actually execute the write action
